description_long: This object is a large, floor-standing control cabinet with a rectangular form and a black exterior. The front features two large transparent doors with visible metal shelving inside, suggesting it is designed for easy access and organization of internal components. The top section has a blue and white decorative panel, possibly for branding or informational purposes. The cabinet is mounted on small wheels, allowing for mobility, and the lower front section includes a vented grille for cooling. The sides and back are solid black panels with minimal detailing, and there are a few small labels or stickers on the front and back. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, black, floor-standing control cabinet with double glass doors, metal shelving, a blue top panel, and vented lower front grille on wheels.
description_view_0: Front view showing double glass doors, internal metal shelves, blue top panel, vented grille, and small labels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid black panel with no visible features or openings.
description_view_2: Rear view with a plain black panel, a few small labels, and a lower vented section.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a solid black panel and no visible features.
